title: Stars Weapons Mod
description: This mods main purpose is to add grindy end game gear to my upcoming Modpack! It also adds other fun stuff
body:
This mods main purpose is to add grindy end game gear to my upcoming Modpack! (not out yet/ is in development)

It currently adds:
- Shooting Star Sword (Sword that takes your MAXHP and halves it => DMG output. Speed 3 when held. Can only be enchanted at an anvil!)
- Fallen Armor (Set effect:"Conduit Power, Protection, Jump Boost, Night Vision)
- Fallen Tools (Have a higher chance to get better enchantments)
- Fallen Multitool (All tools combined, except for sword. Has a higher chance to get better  enchantments. Faster than normal Fallen Tools!)
- Fallen Star (Item to craft the Tools, Armor, Sword and Mozzarella Sticks)
- Netherite Stick (Item to craft the Tools, Sword and Multitool)
- Fallen Music disc (Meme disc -> see for yourself)
- 2 Paintings (Both are penguins)
- Mozzarella Sticks (Food item. Gives saturation and regeneration)
- Damage type (Star's Wrath)
- Particles (Star's Wrath particles)


U should download it to add fun new end game gear to ur world!

Everything is accessible after the Ender Dragon has been defeated!

THIS MOD NEEDS FABRIC API TO WORK!
MoreMcmeta is required for the armor texture animations to work.
Better Combat is optional for the sword swinging animation.


Join my discord to make suggestions for the Mod or my future Modpacks!


**This Mod is all rights reserved and is usable in any Modpack**
